The Format

How It Works

01
👥
Teams Form

Your 60 participants split into competitive teams of 7–8. Coaches set the tone and get the energy up before the clock starts.

02
📱
App Goes Live

Every team plays through a custom mobile app — no paper, no clipboards. Challenges unlock in real time and the leaderboard updates live as teams complete missions.

03
🗺️
Hunt Begins

Teams spread across the Venice Blvd corridor racing through photo, video, GPS, QR, and text challenges. Coaches monitor live and award bonus points for creativity.

04
🏆
Champions Crowned

Teams reconvene at the start. The live leaderboard reveals the winner. Best submissions get showcased — including your team's finest fake Uber product pitches.

Throwback coaches lead the entire experience — powered by custom mobile app (iOS & Android)
The Location

Mar Vista,
Los Angeles

The Venice Boulevard corridor in Mar Vista is one of the most walkable, character-rich stretches in west Los Angeles — virtually unknown outside the neighborhood. Flat, safe, and packed with personality across just half a mile, it's the ideal urban backdrop for a competitive hunt.

Your team navigates between neighborhood murals, independent restaurants, local landmarks, and open public space — all within easy walking distance. No buses, no rideshares needed.

🎨

🌿
Farmers Market Footprint
GPS checkpoint — "epicenter of Mar Vista culture"
🍽️

Café Laurent, FattyMart, Taverna — challenge anchors
🚦

GPS intersection checkpoint — full team arrival required
🚶

Flat, pedestrian-friendly — no transit required

Mission Types

Five Ways to Score

📸
Photo

Capture it. Creativity judged live by coaches.

🎥
Video

Perform it. 15–30 second clips submitted through the app.

📍
GPS

Get there. Location-verified checkpoints across the corridor.

🔲
QR Code

Scan to reveal. Hidden codes unlock surprise missions.

🧠
Text

Think fast. Observation and logic. No Googling allowed.

The Missions

Sample Challenges

A mix of creative, competitive, and downright ridiculous challenges — some built for any team, some built specifically for yours.

Photo
🖼️
Museum Quality

Recreate a famous painting or movie poster using only your teammates and whatever's around you.

Photo
🎨
Strike a Pose

Find street art in the neighborhood and have the whole team strike a pose matching the energy of the artwork.

Video
🎬
Silent Movie

Film a 30-second silent movie acting out how your workday went this morning. No words. Not even mouthing them.

Video
📺
Breaking News

Produce a 15-second local news segment on a completely mundane neighborhood event. Commitment is everything.

GPS Check-In
🌿
Epicenter

Check in at the Mar Vista Farmers Market footprint. All team members must be present to unlock.

GPS Check-In
🚦
Full Team Arrival

Check in at Venice Blvd / Beethoven St. GPS only unlocks once every teammate is present at the corner.

QR Code
🔍
Mystery Ingredient

Scan to reveal a mystery ingredient. 10 minutes to find it — or something that closely resembles it.

QR Code
🎲
Choose Your Adventure

Scan to unlock two challenge options. Pick one and commit. No switching. Point values differ.

Text
🪑
Chair Count

Count outdoor dining chairs visible from a specific corner. Precision beats speed. One chance to answer.

Text
📖
Double Meaning

Find a business name that's also a real English word with a different meaning. Most obscure find wins.

Built for Uber
Photo
🚗
Getting from A to B

Find something that represents "getting from A to B" and photograph it with your team. Coaches judge creativity.

Built for Uber
Photo
🔵
Spot the Sticker

Find a car with an Uber sticker in the neighborhood and snap a photo with the whole team. First to submit scores full points.

Built for Uber
Video
💡
The Pitch

Film a 15-second pitch for a fake Uber product — Uber Naps, Uber Dog Walks, Uber Complaints. Coaches reward the most convincing pitch.

Built for Uber
GPS
⚡
Surge Zone Sprint

A GPS checkpoint activates at a specific corner. Teams have 3 minutes to arrive before the "surge" expires and points drop.

Built for Uber
QR Code
🍔
Uber Eats Order

Scan a hidden QR to reveal a fake Uber Eats order. 10 minutes to find the closest match in the neighborhood.

Old School Fun — Built for Modern Teams
